description: Formulary for a legal document for somebody dropping a medical malpractice suit against a person hired to treat the eyes of his son but who in fact ruined them (אתלף עינאה). The plaintiff accepts that this was inevitable by the will of God (כאן במשיה אללה) and not the fault of the practitioner. (Information in part from CUDL.) ASE
tags: illness: eye, blindness, contracting for a cure, Illness: treatment, malpractice, Illness
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
